programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Chocolate Showdown
programme.desc: Do You Have What It Bakes?: Ooey-gooey, decadent competition series. 10 new bakers dive into the wonderful world of chocolate and tackle table tempering and an animal challenge.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programme.desc: Competitive cookery series. The top four contestants must prove that they deserve a place in the final by integrating dishes with circus performances.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show. Sara enlists the help of friend and estate agent Michael Davalos to find a place in Miami that has enough space for her whole family.

programme.title: Georgia and Tommy: Baby Steps
programme.desc: After learning some very sad news about their pregnancy, Georgia and Tommy decide that they need time to themselves and fly to Majorca for some rest and relaxation.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex: Italia
programme.desc: Georgia organises a couples' trip and whisks Tommy away to Italy while in Essex, Courtney is working on her revenge body. But is she ready to move on.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: US reality series. Catch the never-before-seen, most revealing and hilarious moments of season 12.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series. It's the last full day in Ireland for the Jersey lasses as Paul's family stops by the castle for a visit and Jennifer plans a hen party.

programme.title: Ant and Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host the quiz with the biggest cash prize in British TV history as Sarah and her mum Fiona face the ultimate challenge in trying to climb the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the show creeps to its conclusion, two more celebrities leave the African Savannah. A cruel trial leaves a campmate frustrated and close to yelling the fateful words.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Sir Chris Hoy, Martine McCutcheon, and Faye Tozer all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The Essex power couples return home after an eventful time in Sardinia. But can Myles manage to smooth things over in Essex.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The reunion kicks off with a bang when a shocking revelation leaves the ladies speechless. Kandi and Porsha discuss their complicated relationship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series. The ladies reflect back on their Ireland trip, but Danielle only wants to let Melissa know what tea was spilled.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Dion Dublin, Rachel Riley, and Tim Vine all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of their chosen charity.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the show creeps to its conclusion, two more celebrities leave the African Savannah. A cruel trial leaves a campmate frustrated and close to yelling the fateful words.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: US cooking competition. WWE champions Braun Strowman, Liv Morgan, and Big E join Chef Ramsay as the final seven try to win much-coveted black jackets.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: One Foot in Front of the Mother: Anarchic animated sitcom. Chris discovers by accident that he has a talent for speed walking at school, and Brian is made to wear a shock collar.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg, Brian and Stewie go to Russia when Brian's Instagram gets hacked, and a bad date sees Lois revert to her tormented teenage self.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter enjoys the perks of being a single parent when he's mistaken for one.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy. Francine steals from the CIA and pretends to be a sexy supervillain to push Stan into being more seductive, and Roger plans to trap Jay Leno.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy. Steve is kidnapped and taken to the North Pole by Santa Claus, who is using children to mine precious stones for an ancient ritual.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy. Gene is upset when he breaks his favourite Christmas album, and Teddy's idea for a compact neighbourhood Secret Santa turns into a mess.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy. An old photo that brings up unhappy memories and a Tina-Louise conflict over a desk leads Linda to enrol them in a loft bed-building effort.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as one of his bold contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a chance to win a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Chocolate Showdown
programme.desc: Where There's A Whisk, There's A Way: Ooey-gooey, decadent competition series. The nine remaining bakers create playful vessels and use two mystery ingredients to avoid elimination.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programme.desc: American competitive cookery series. The final three contestants battle for Gordon's investment by transforming empty retail spaces into pop-up launch events.

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show. A couple decide to buy a home for their growing family in downtown Toronto that has room for entertaining and outdoor space.

programme.title: Georgia and Tommy: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Georgia and Tommy arrive back from Majorca and make the most of Brody's second birthday before they start to discuss plans for trying for another baby.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The Essex power couples return home after an eventful time in Sardinia. But can Myles manage to smooth things over in Essex.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The reunion kicks off with a bang when a shocking revelation leaves the ladies speechless. Kandi and Porsha discuss their complicated relationship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series. The ladies reflect back on their Ireland trip, but Danielle only wants to let Melissa know what tea was spilled.

programme.title: Ant and Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host the quiz with the biggest cash prize in British TV history as brothers Lee and Kye return to take on the Limitless money ladder, but how high will they climb.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out Of Here!'s most memorable campmates in the brand-new setting of South Africa.. South Africa
programme.desc: This show sees the return of some of I'm A Celebritybut who will triumph.

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the classic game show as Geri, Diarmaid and Trevena compete to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues for a chance to win up to 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Battles start to brew between Essex's biggest power couples as Yaz and Lockie clash with Dan and Amber. What will happen when the couples come face to face at Essex-Fest.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: US reality series. Kenya and Porsha discuss where their relationship went wrong. Eva breaks down while talking about her journey with her daughter.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series. The Catanias have a celebratory family dinner that includes Paul and Brittany, and a Prohibition-themed party is planned.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out Of Here!'s most memorable campmates in the brand-new setting of South Africa.. South Africa
programme.desc: This show sees the return of some of I'm A Celebritybut who will triumph.

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the classic game show as Bryoney, Gary and Sanaj compete to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues for a chance to win up to 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts as households compete in a street-sized reality game for a £250,000 prize. The first immunity challenge sees Graham suspending the neighbours seven metres high.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg comes home from Russia after realising that Ivan was using her, and Chris and Principal Shepherd enter into a pornographic enterprise.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... Unpacked Live
programme.desc: Fun-filled companion show featuring the best behind-the-scenes gossip and delving deeper into camp life than ever before.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. Meg joins the Adam West High basketball team, and Stewie ends up with multiple personalities after following conspiracy theories.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy. Steve becomes a pariah after he convinces the star quarterback of the arena football team to retire, and Roger calls in his debts from Hayley.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy. Stan's new obsession for slot car racing is a turn-off for Francine, and Roger gets a job as a stewardess to perform comedy on planes.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy. When the teachers at Wagstaff are desperate to be nice when they are officially evaluated by the students, Louise exploits the situation.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Stuck in the Kitchen with You: Animated comedy. Bob gets roped into doing the cooking for an old people's home's Thanksgiving dinner while the kids improvise a holiday parade.

programme.title: Deep Fake Neighbour Wars
programme.desc: Tyson Fury and Cardi B live next door to busy classic car mechanic Simon Cowell, and Harry Kane is in dispute with his clumsy neighbour Stormzy.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Project Bakeover
programme.desc: Canadian reality series. When owner Tanya needs Steve's help saving her bakery cafe, Steve shows her how to increase her sales with new products and local ingredients.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme. Brian McCourt and Sarah Keenleyside build a parents-only hideaway for two hardworking parents who have four children.
